theatres.title: Chardikala
theatres.review: The film follows story of Bibi Bimal Kaur a mother and a wife who is falsely implicated in a major incident, leading to her being abandoned by society. She…
theatres.fullReview: The film follows story of Bibi Bimal Kaur a mother and a wife who is falsely implicated in a major incident, leading to her being abandoned by society. She finds refuge in Punjab, where she moves from being a victim to a leader.

theatres.title: Obsession
theatres.review: After breaking the mysterious "One Wish Willow" to win his crush's heart, a hopeless romantic finds himself getting exactly what he asked for but soon…
theatres.fullReview: After breaking the mysterious "One Wish Willow" to win his crush's heart, a hopeless romantic finds himself getting exactly what he asked for but soon discovers that some desires come at a dark, sinister price.

theatres.title: Return of the Jungle
theatres.review: Nine year old Mihir and his friends are faced with the daunting task of outwitting the biggest, meanest bully in school, Rahul Malhotra. To help them ride…
theatres.fullReview: Nine year old Mihir and his friends are faced with the daunting task of outwitting the biggest, meanest bully in school, Rahul Malhotra. To help them ride through this impossible journey, they turn to Thatha and his fantastic tales of inspiration from the ancient Jungles of India. Together, they must build a ruthless dinosaur, fight a nerve- racking game of cricket and travel all the way to Rajasthan, to rediscover the power of friendship, compassion and determination.

theatres.title: Kattalan
theatres.review: Power-hungry forces clash in the Ivory cartel war-a fierce story of control, vengeance, and survival where compassion vanishes and only the ruthless endure.
theatres.fullReview: Power-hungry forces clash in the Ivory cartel war-a fierce story of control, vengeance, and survival where compassion vanishes and only the ruthless endure.

theatres.title: Blast
theatres.review: Follows a family trained to protect the powerless who become the most dangerous obstacle of all.
theatres.fullReview: Follows a family trained to protect the powerless who become the most dangerous obstacle of all.

theatres.title: Ugly Story

theatres.fullReview: Follows a man who becomes obsessively attached to a girl in love with someone else, descending into a dark psychological state as he struggles with rejection, leading to dangerous consequences.

ott.title: Rick and Morty
ott.review: Follows a sociopathic genius scientist who drags his inherently timid grandson on adventures across the universe.
ott.fullReview: Follows a sociopathic genius scientist who drags his inherently timid grandson on adventures across the universe.

ott.title: Brown
ott.review: Brown is a recovering alcoholic, who works for Kolkata Police and has to investigate the murder of a young woman from a well-known family.
ott.fullReview: Brown is a recovering alcoholic, who works for Kolkata Police and has to investigate the murder of a young woman from a well-known family.

ott.title: One Piece
ott.review: Years ago, the fearsome Pirate King, Gol D. Roger was executed leaving a huge pile of treasure and the famous "One Piece" behind. Whoever claims the "One…
ott.fullReview:
Years ago, the fearsome Pirate King, Gol D. Roger was executed leaving a huge pile of treasure and the famous "One Piece" behind. Whoever claims the "One Piece" will be named the new King of the Pirates.

Monkey D. Luffy, a boy who consumed a "Devil Fruit," decides to follow in the footsteps of his idol, the pirate Shanks, and find the One Piece. It helps, of course, that his body has the properties of rubber and that he's surrounded by a bevy of skilled fighters and thieves to help him along the way.

Luffy will do anything to get the One Piece and become King of the Pirates!

ott.title: The Pyramid Scheme
ott.review: Follows the story of Goldy, an ambitious but impatient young man, whose quest to get rich through a pyramid marketing business spirals into a rollercoaster of…
ott.fullReview: Follows the story of Goldy, an ambitious but impatient young man, whose quest to get rich through a pyramid marketing business spirals into a rollercoaster of chaos - risking not just his future, but also the love and trust of his close-knit joint family.

ott.title: The Boys
ott.review: A group of vigilantes known informally as “The Boys” set out to take down corrupt superheroes with no more than blue-collar grit and a willingness to fight…
ott.fullReview: A group of vigilantes known informally as “The Boys” set out to take down corrupt superheroes with no more than blue-collar grit and a willingness to fight dirty.

ott.title: System
ott.review: When Neha Rajvansh, a privileged public prosecutor, meets Sarika Rawat, a courtroom stenographer from a humble background, their lives are thrown into upheaval…
ott.fullReview: When Neha Rajvansh, a privileged public prosecutor, meets Sarika Rawat, a courtroom stenographer from a humble background, their lives are thrown into upheaval where power defines truth, blurring the system and raising a question of what justice truly means to them.

ott.title: Euphoria
ott.review: A group of high school students navigate love and friendships in a world of drugs, sex, trauma, and social media.
ott.fullReview: A group of high school students navigate love and friendships in a world of drugs, sex, trauma, and social media.

ott.title: Maa Behen
ott.review: In this dark comedy, a woman calls her estranged daughters in the middle of the night with chilling news — there's a dead body in her kitchen.
ott.fullReview: In this dark comedy, a woman calls her estranged daughters in the middle of the night with chilling news — there's a dead body in her kitchen.

ott.title: Re:ZERO -Starting Life in Another World-
ott.review: Natsuki Subaru, an ordinary high school  student, is on his way home from the convenience store when he finds  himself transported to another world. As he's…
ott.fullReview: Natsuki Subaru, an ordinary high school  student, is on his way home from the convenience store when he finds  himself transported to another world. As he's lost and confused in a new  world where he doesn't even know left from right, the only person to  reach out to him was a beautiful girl with silver hair. Determined to  repay her somehow for saving him from his own despair, Subaru agrees to  help the girl find something she's looking for.

ott.title: Teach You a Lesson
ott.review: When respect collapses in schools, unconventional inspectors arrive to set things right — with sharp, no-nonsense lessons you won't find in textbooks.
ott.fullReview: When respect collapses in schools, unconventional inspectors arrive to set things right — with sharp, no-nonsense lessons you won't find in textbooks.

comingSoon.title: Colony
comingSoon.review: Professor Se-jeong is thrust into a bloody nightmare when a rapidly mutating virus is released during a biotech…
comingSoon.fullReview: Professor Se-jeong is thrust into a bloody nightmare when a rapidly mutating virus is released during a biotech conference causing authorities to seal the facility. Trapped inside with no escape, Se-jeong along with a small group of survivors must fight to stay alive while the infected undergo horrific transformations.

comingSoon.title: Cocktail 2
comingSoon.review: After a decade together, Diya and Kunal's relationship is shaken when Ally, an old friend, re-enters their lives. What…
comingSoon.fullReview: After a decade together, Diya and Kunal's relationship is shaken when Ally, an old friend, re-enters their lives. What begins as a plan between two women spirals into chaos, triggering hilarious, emotional rollercoaster none of them saw coming.

comingSoon.fullReview: Through both her moments of fear and bravery, a woman discovers that embracing her vulnerabilities is as vital to her inner strength as facing challenges head-on.

comingSoon.title: Nooru Saami
comingSoon.review: A widowed mother who single-handedly raises her two sons decides to remarry. Her decision faces resistance from the…
comingSoon.fullReview: A widowed mother who single-handedly raises her two sons decides to remarry. Her decision faces resistance from the conservative men in her village, leading to a struggle between personal happiness and societal expectations.

comingSoon.title: Balan - The Boy
comingSoon.review: Follows a teenage boy searching for his missing mother following a turbulent childhood and her subsequent…
comingSoon.fullReview: Follows a teenage boy searching for his missing mother following a turbulent childhood and her subsequent disappearance, exploring his search for closure and the truth about his past.

comingSoon.title: Chaali Din
comingSoon.review: Chaali Din is an adaption of best selling punjabi novel of the same name. This gripping story by Gurpreet Dhugga delves…
comingSoon.fullReview: Chaali Din is an adaption of best selling punjabi novel of the same name. This gripping story by Gurpreet Dhugga delves into the complexities of human emotions and relationships over a transformative 40-day journey. The book explores themes of love, loss, redemption, and self-discovery through vivid storytelling and well-drawn characters. With its gripping narrative and profound insights, this work captures the essence of life’s challenges and triumphs.

comingSoon.title: Ananthan Kaadu
comingSoon.review: This is a tale, which almost became a true story. It unfolds in the late Eighties and early Nineties, when the country…
comingSoon.fullReview: This is a tale, which almost became a true story. It unfolds in the late Eighties and early Nineties, when the country was going through a dark phase both politically and socially a time when turmoil was writ all over the political scape of the nation.
